title: Update lichen_tdma_init(), lichen_link_set_slot() and tdma_tx_allowed() to use computed slot from EUI64+epoch
description: Integrate lichen_tdma_compute_slot in lichen_tdma_init using ctx->eui64 and current epoch. Update structs if needed. Ensure tdma_tx_allowed respects hash-based slot. Cross-ref AGENTS.md init order. Match spec exactly.
close_reason: Updated lichen_tdma_init to compute hash-based slot using EUI64^epoch per spec, added lichen_tdma_compute_slot, updated set_slot and tx_allowed integration, cleaned dead code and AGENTS.md init graph. Test updated and verified via hash calc. Committed as 9b7b84d45.
